description.from: Launches an attack that bounces 4 times starting from the nearest enemy, dealing 460*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 292% of ATK M.DMG to each enemy hit. DMG increases by up to 100% the farther the enemy is. This attack is treated as a Normal Attack.
description.to: Unleashes an attack that bounces 4 times starting from the nearest enemy, dealing 684*(1+0.3Skill Level)+300% of Attack Power Magic Damage to each enemy hit. Damage increases by up to 100% the farther the enemy is. This attack is treated as a Normal Attack.

description.from: Deals 508*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 321.8% of ATK M.DMG 2 time(s) to a random enemy and nearby enemies, and stuns them for 1sec. DMG increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.
description.to: Deals 792*(1+0.3Skill Level)+347.5% of Attack Power Magic Damage 2 time(s) to a random enemy and surrounding enemies, and stuns them for 1sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

description.from: Deals 132*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 84% of ATK M.DMG 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for 1.5sec, and reduces Crit Chance by 60% for 4sec. DMG increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.
description.to: Deals 342*(1+0.3Skill Level)+150% of Attack Power Magic Damage 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for 1sec, and reduces their Critical Chance by 25% for 7sec. Damage increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.

description.from: Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing 440*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 278.6% of ATK M.DMG, knocking them back for 1sec, and increasing M.DMG taken by 20% for 6sec. DMG increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.
description.to: Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing 799*(1+0.3Skill Level)+350% of Attack Power Magic Damage, knocking them back for 0.5sec, and increasing Magic Damage taken by 20% for 6sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

dark.from: Reduces ACC of hit enemies by 500 for 4 sec.
dark.to: For 7 sec, reduces Accuracy of enemies hit by 150.

description.from: [Twinkle Twinkle] Reduces M.Crit Resist by {0}, and this reduction becomes irremovable.
description.to: [Twinkle Twinkle] The Crit Chance Reduction effect becomes irremovable, and increases the duration by {0} sec.

dark.from: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by 15%, and damage taken is reduced by 15%.
dark.to: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by 10%, and damage taken is reduced by 10%.
